name: coODAbortTransfer
title: coODAbortTransfer
description: This function is only available in the event functions (callbacks).
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
Note This function is only available in the event functions (callbacks).
void coODAbortTransfer( dword abortCode, dword errCode[] );
The function aborts a SDO transfer, which was initiated on an object with access type 7. It can be used in the event functions coOnDownloadIndication or coOnUploadIndication.
abortCode Abort code of the SDO transfer (see /3/ or coOnError under error class 3, except 0xFF01...)
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)

Example void coOnUploadIndication (dword index, dword subIndex) { dword errCode[1]; if (index > 0x2003) {coODAbortTransfer( 0x06020000, errCode ); // object doesn't exist if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "Aborting SDO transfer successfully initiated" ); } }}
